tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Capo 6th Fret

Play these chords throughout: [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Come here, rude boy boy[/tab]

Can you get it up?

Yeah, we can get it on yeah
